fields.name: VITALITY
fields.definition:
If the damage is below the lower bound, the surface won't break.
If the damage is above the upper bound, the surface always breaks.
In the middle, the surface will break with a weighted random chance.
Negative values mean that the surface will never break from that kind of damage.

fields.name: direct damage vitality#this is damage from bullets hitting the surface

collision damage impulse thresholds#not really vitality - this is mass * velocity into the surface.  Running player bipeds cap out around 255
run 'event_display_category physics:breakable_surfaces verbose' to get verbose information about damage to breakable surfaces
